claim_boundary.may_support: selected qualitative inspection for covered material-effect bins after clean provenance gate
must_not_support: all material effects preserve visual fidelity

checks.visible_evidence: The four Original MDL cells show the intended targets without saturated red material fallback.
checks.risk: None visible in the reviewed contact sheet.

checks.visible_evidence: Bottle, cup, and original/noMDL backpack targets are clear. NVIDIA clock and backpack remain low-contrast or washed, but the target shapes are still visible.
checks.risk: Use as selected qualitative evidence only; do not turn this into a broad visual-quality win/loss rate.

checks.visible_evidence: Each row uses the same target-centered view across Original MDL, ConvertAsset, and NVIDIA conditions.
checks.risk: NVIDIA material conversion changes contrast and color enough that captions/prose must keep the comparison bounded.

recommendation: Keep the contact sheet available for supplemental or rebuttal inspection, while keeping the ACL main-paper material-effect claim table-bounded.
